message:
fix(sharding): validate shard IDs against 16-bit encoded pane-id capacity

Add MAX_SHARD_ID constant and validate shard IDs at three boundaries:
- encode_sharded_pane_id: assert at encoding time
- ShardedWeztermClient::new: reject overflow in backend configuration
- Config::validate: reject socket_paths exceeding encoding capacity

Prevents silent bit-truncation when shard count exceeds the 16-bit
field in the encoded pane-id format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
